emails.subject: Re: Collateral GTC's
emails.body: Re: Collateral GTC's Perhaps it stems from our offline GTC's which give us some collateral rights in any sale transaction? I am not aware of any requirement from Credit for a single GTC for these commodities. David Forster 02/17/2000 01:59 PM

emails.subject: Re: Collateral GTC's
emails.body: Re: Collateral GTC's Perhaps it stems from our offline GTC's which give us some collateral rights in any sale transaction? I am not aware of any requirement from Credit for a single GTC for these commodities. David Forster 02/17/2000 01:59 PM

emails.subject: Collateral GTC's
emails.body: Collateral GTC's All, I am aware that early in the EnronOnline process, some GTC's were only generated for the "With Collateral" category and hence, all companies transacting in that commodity were subject to the collateral clause. I am now starting to wonder if this was an oversight, or if there is a reason why all counterparties should be bound by a collateral clause for the following GTC's/Products: I would appreciate any insight which any of you can offer. Thanks, Dave
